description: 'Create NNN-PLAN.md — milestone tasks with files and acceptance criteria (features/MVP)'
---

Read `NNN-BRIEF.md` and `NNN-DESIGN.md` when present. Ask if scope is unclear.

Turn agreed scope into a milestone-based implementation plan. 
Each task must be one `/build-step`-sized unit, completable and verifiable on its own.

**Artifact (required)**
- Read `schemas/PLAN.md` before writing.
- Prepend this header at the very top of the file (verbatim):
<!--
******************************************************
*****                AI GENERATED                *****
******************************************************
-->
- Write `docs/ai/NNN-PLAN.md` on disk — not chat-only. Create `docs/ai/` if missing. Use schema headings exactly.

### Next Step
Review `docs/ai/NNN-PLAN.md` and run `/build-step`
